vdb_memstore_backup.description: Provides a VNG Cloud vDB Memory store Backup. This can be used to import, create, and delete.

vdb_memstore_backup_storage.description: Provides a VNG Cloud vDB Memory store Backup storage. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vdb_memstore_config_group.description: Provides a VNG Cloud vDB Memory store Configuration group. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vdb_memstore_database.description: Provides a VNG Cloud vDB Memory store Database. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vdb_relational_backup.description: Provides a VNG Cloud vDB Relational Backup. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vdb_relational_backup_storage.description: Provides a VNG Cloud vDB Relational Backup storage. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vdb_relational_config_group.description: Provides a VNG Cloud vDB Relational Configuration group. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vdb_relational_database.description: Provides a VNG Cloud vDB Relational Database. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vks_cluster.description: Creates a Cluster on VNGCloud Kubernetes Service (VKS).

vlb_loadbalancer.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VLB resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, resize, and delete.

vlb_loadbalancer_certificate.description: ResourceCA is a Terraform resource that represents a certificate authority (CA). It can be used to import, and delete CAs in a target system.

vlb_loadbalancer_listener.description: Provides a Load Balancer Listener resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vlb_loadbalancer_policy.description: Provides a load balancer policy, which can be attached to an LB listener. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vlb_loadbalancer_pool.description: Provides a Pool resource for use with Load Balancer resources. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_address_pair_interface_attachmen.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Address Pair Interface Attachment resource.

vserver_attach_lb.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Attach Load Balancer To Cluster resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_change_cluster_sec_group.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Change Cluster Sec Group resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_cluster_node_group.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Cluster Node Group resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_external_interface_attach.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Attach External Interface to server. This can be used to create and delete.

vserver_internal_interface_attach.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Attach Internal Interface to Server. This can be used to attach and detach.

vserver_k8s.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Kubernetes resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_network.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Network resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_network_interface.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Network Interface resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_route_table.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Route Table resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_secgroup.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Security Group resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_secgrouprule.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Security Group Rule resource. This can be used to import, create, and delete.

vserver_server.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Server resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_server_group.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Server Group resource. This can be used to import create, modify, and delete.

vserver_sshkey.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer SSH Key resource. This can be used to import, create, and delete.

vserver_subnet.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Subnet resource. This can be used to import, create, and delete.

vserver_vip.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Virtual Ip Address resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_volume.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Volume resource. This can be used to import, create, modify, and delete.

vserver_volume_attach.description: Provides a VNG Cloud VServer Acttach volume to server. This can be used to create and delete.
